---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for transcribe-easy
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What is the workflow that is currently
hard or impossible?

## Proposed solution

A clear, concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools, or any
other context that helps reviewers understand the request.
